design_philosophy.core_loop: Race across the United States in a high-speed arcade racer, navigating dynamic weather and time-of-day conditions while evading police cars and choosing between multiple route forks
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Speed vs. Navigation - maintain velocity while managing environmental hazards (weather, visibility) and avoiding law enforcement
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Cross-country high-speed arcade racing with dynamic environmental storytelling and Route 66-style American roadway exploration
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Prioritizes technical 32-bit visual spectacle and environmental detail (windshield wipers, headlights, weather effects) over traditional arcade racing gameplay depth; this is a graphics-first racing game rather than a mechanics-first one

difficulty.continues_system: Arcade continue system (implied by arcade format)
difficulty.checkpointing: Branching route structure allows skipping multiple stages at fork points, providing player agency in difficulty pacing
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Players can choose alternate routes to bypass difficult stages; weather and time-of-day conditions dynamically adjust visibility and handling, creating variable challenge

progression.unlock_mechanism: Route branching system where players can fork off the main path to skip stages and take alternative racing paths across the United States
replayability_hooks: Multiple route branches allowing different stage sequences
Dynamic weather and time-of-day cycles create variable environmental conditions on repeat playthroughs
Police evasion mechanic encourages different driving strategies

world_building_techniques: Cross-country race structure provides implicit geography and journey narrative
Dynamic weather system creates temporal progression (day/night cycles, rain requiring windshield wipers)
Police pursuit framing suggests outlaw-racing narrative context
Environmental detail (headlights, brake lights, weather-responsive UI) reinforces realistic driving simulation aesthetic

danger_signals: Weather hazards (rain, night visibility) as environmental threats
environmental_storytelling: Vehicle customization visible through rearview mirror (Sonic ornament placement)
Dynamic environmental responses (windshield wipers, headlights activation based on weather/time)
